name: fantasy-economy-rpg
description: Browser-based multiplayer fantasy RPG with a regional economy and classic menu combat

scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace packages/shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.pretest: npm run build --workspace packages/shared && node scripts/prepare-db.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace packages/shared && npm run build --workspace apps/api && npm run build --workspace apps/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build --workspace packages/shared && npm run dev --workspace apps/api
scripts.dev:worker: npm run build --workspace packages/shared && npm run dev:worker --workspace apps/api
